user.title: Set up Ninja Woodfire
user.description: Select a nearby Ninja Woodfire device or enter a Bluetooth address manually.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Ninja Woodfire found
bluetooth_confirm.description:
Do you want to add **{name}** ({address}) to Home Assistant?

Only confirm if this is your device.

abort.not_ninja_device: This device does not appear to be a Ninja Woodfire.

init.title: Ninja Woodfire options
init.description:
Device: {address}

You can rename this device. To remove it, use the device page in Home Assistant.
